# `ClearBitmap`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128  
**Parameters:** `a, b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>ClearBitmap( [address], [byte variable] );</h3>
<ul>
<li>[address] - address of the bitmap</li>
<li>[byte value] - value used to clear the bitmap</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Fills the given address with 40*25*8 bytes with the byte value passed. Used for clearing bitmaps.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
ClearBitmap(my_charset, 0);
</code>


</div>
